version_description:
v1 — CA Sub-Agent Final (April 2026)

Standalone Cancel Agent extracted from Base Agent inline CA flow.

Flow structure:
• 25 nodes, 14 components, 139 KB
• Dual finalization routing: cancel-only (Finalization) and cancel-then-reschedule (Finalization Reschedule)
• Global components: Emergency Detection, Transfer To Human, End Call
• Sets has_completed_ca_flow=true before agent_swap return to Base Agent

Prompts refined:
• Name, DOB, DOB Clarification, Callback fallbacks — aligned with RA Agent style (no general services offer)
• Finalization summaries — conversational, non-repetitive, focused on key changes

Test coverage: 16/16 dedicated CA Agent tests pass (8 cancel-only, 4 cancel-then-reschedule, 4 global: ED+TTH)
